_meta.description: AtQuery Community Toolbox — self-expanding skill registry. New tools are added automatically when a user query has no match in the built-in toolboxes.

tools.name: calculate_zonal_statistics_for_elevation
tools.description: Calculate zonal statistics for a given raster elevation layer grouped by the AdminArea_DCD administrative areas.
